clips.title: The Clearing
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dynamic FPV grade. A dense green forest with a sunlit clearing beyond, trees and shafts of light. Morning, warm. A person in outdoor gear stands in the clearing looking up. A fast FPV drone flies swiftly through the trees, weaving between trunks and rushing out into the clearing toward them. Warm dappled light, motion blur, FPV drone fly-through. Crisp detail, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Warehouse
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, gritty FPV grade. A vast empty warehouse, steel columns, shafts of light from high windows, dust in the air. Day. A person in a jacket stands in a pool of light in the center. A fast FPV drone flies swiftly through the warehouse, weaving between columns and rushing toward them. Hard shafts of light, floating dust, FPV drone fly-through. Crisp detail, motion blur, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stadium
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, epic FPV grade. A packed sports stadium, roaring crowd, bright floodlights, a green pitch. Night, electric. A person in athletic kit stands alone at the center of the pitch. A fast FPV drone flies swiftly over the crowd and swoops down across the field toward them. Bright floodlights, crowd bokeh, FPV drone fly-through. Crisp detail, motion blur, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Gorge
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, thrilling FPV grade. A dramatic river gorge, sheer rock walls, rushing water below, mist. Day, dynamic. A person in adventure gear stands on a ledge above the river. A fast FPV drone flies swiftly through the gorge, skimming the water and rushing up toward them on the ledge. Cool gorge light, drifting mist, FPV drone fly-through. Crisp detail, motion blur, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Streets
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, kinetic FPV grade. A bustling narrow city street, signs and awnings, pedestrians and traffic. Day, lively. A person in street style stands on a corner amid the bustle. A fast FPV drone flies swiftly down the street, weaving past signs and traffic toward them. Bright urban light, motion blur, FPV drone fly-through. Crisp detail, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Cave
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, atmospheric FPV grade. A vast cavern with a bright opening ahead, stalactites, a still underground pool. Day, cool. A person with a headlamp stands near the glowing cave mouth. A fast FPV drone flies swiftly through the cavern, skimming the pool and rushing toward the light and them. Cool cave shadow, bright opening, FPV drone fly-through. Crisp detail, motion blur, grain, 24fps.
